meta.question: List APS Interface Requirements and their Acceptance State.
meta.finalAnswer:
APS Interface Requirements and Acceptance State:

| APS Interface Requirement | Acceptance State |
|---------------------------|------------------|
| APS to CSW ICD | Accepted |
| APS to DMS ICD | Accepted |
| APS to OSS ICD | Accepted |
| APS to SER ICD | Accepted |
| M1CS GLC to APS ICD | Accepted |
| SCMS to APS ICD | Accepted |
| STR to APS ICD | Accepted |
| TCS to APS ICD | Accepted |

All 8 APS Interface Requirements (ICDs) have an "Accepted" acceptance state.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found APS-related elements including packages and views. Need to explore further to find actual APS Interface Requirements and their acceptance states. Let me look for requirements with "interface" in the name within APS packages.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Interface")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found multiple APS Interface Requirements (ICDs) like "TCS to APS ICD", "APS to CSW ICD", etc. Now need to find their acceptance states by exploring the properties of these requirements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("TCS to APS ICD"))) 
  ?req ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name "TCS%20to%20APS%2520ICD" .
  ?req ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

SELECT ?req ?name WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("ICD")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 25

}

PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>

SELECT ?dep ?depName ?type WHERE {

}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>

request.reason: Found the structure: acceptance state is stored in a slot with definingFeature "TMT Requirement::Acceptance State" which points to an instance value that references an enumeration literal. Now I can build the final query to get all APS Interface Requirements with their acceptance states.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?reqName ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("ICD"))) 
  
  ?req vocab:Element_appliedStereotypeInstance ?instSpec .
  ?instSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?definingFeature .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?definingFeature), "Acceptance%20State"))
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?value .
  ?value vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?acceptanceState .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?reqName ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("ICD"))) 
  
  ?req vocab:Element_appliedStereotypeInstance ?instSpec .
  ?instSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?definingFeature .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?definingFeature), "Acceptance"))
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?value .
  ?value vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?acceptanceState .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?reqName ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("ICD"))) 
  
  ?req vocab:Element_appliedStereotypeInstance ?instSpec .
  ?instSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?definingFeature .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?definingFeature), "TMT%20Requirement"))
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?value .
  ?value vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?acceptanceState .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?reqName ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("ICD"))) 
  
  ?req vocab:Element_appliedStereotypeInstance ?instSpec .
  ?instSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?definingFeature .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?value .
  ?value vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?acceptanceState .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?reqName ?slot ?definingFeature ?value WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("TCS to APS"))) 
  
  ?req vocab:Element_appliedStereotypeInstance ?instSpec .

  ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?definingFeature .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?value .

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?reqName ?slot ?definingFeature ?value WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  
  ?req vocab:Element_appliedStereotypeInstance ?instSpec .
  ?instSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?definingFeature .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?value .

}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?reqName ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("ICD"))) 
  
  ?req vocab:Element_appliedStereotypeInstance ?instSpec .
  ?instSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?definingFeature .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?definingFeature), "Acceptance%20State"))
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?value .
  ?value vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?acceptanceState .
}
ORDER BY ?reqName

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>

ORDER BY ?reqName

  ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?enumLiteralName .

  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), "icd"))
}
ORDER BY ?reqName
LIMIT 30

  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), "aps"))

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?reqName ?instSpec WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), "aps"))

}

PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>

SELECT ?slot ?definingFeature ?value WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/instance%20specification/_18_0_2_b4c02e1_1428502677887_640882_266222> vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?definingFeature .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?value .
}
LIMIT 20

PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?enumLiteralName WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/instance%20value/_19_0_4_46d01c0_1627813149187_606186_92627> vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  ?enumLiteral vocab:NamedElement_name ?enumLiteralName .
}
LIMIT 10

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop ?value WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/instance%20value/_19_0_4_46d01c0_1627813149187_606186_92627> ?prop ?value .
}
LIMIT 20

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?reqName ?acceptanceState WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), "aps"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), "icd"))
  
  ?req vocab:Element_appliedStereotypeInstance ?instSpec .
  ?instSpec vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?definingFeature .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?definingFeature), "Acceptance%20State"))
  ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?value .
  ?value vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?enumLiteral .
  BIND(STR(?enumLiteral) AS ?enumLiteralStr)
  BIND(REPLACE(?enumLiteralStr, ".*::", "", "i") AS ?acceptanceState)
}
ORDER BY ?reqName
